name: Sanyodo Holdings Inc
summary: Sanyodo Holdings Inc. sells and rents books, magazines, video and music software, game software, and stationery and miscellaneous goods in Japan. The company is also involved in the financial products brokerage, real estate rental, and insurance agency businesses. As of November 30, 2017, it operated through a network of 83 stores. The company was founded in 1978 and is headquartered in Nagoya, Japan.
